title: osteospermum fruticosum
intro: Osteospermum fruticosum, also known as the prickly osteospermum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Cape Provinces of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Osteospermum fruticosum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
